action.reasoning: Observation: Empty workspace, first iteration, data at /data/vlabench_train with HDF5 episodes from LIBERO (2-view RGB, 8D state, 7D action, instructions, task_index 0-39). Pre-cached lerobot/pi0_base (~4B params) available. VLABench evaluator and PI0Policy load path confirmed in hints. Analysis: Must start with PI0 baseline + minimal adapter per guidance (avoid from-scratch CNN/MLP which give 0.0). Full eval ~2h so first step must validate load/preprocess/bridge without long training. Decision: Explore data+loading with command, then create minimal predict.py using pretrained PI0Policy (no training yet, control_mode=ee, action chunking bridge from LIBERO to VLABench ee_pose+gripper), submit_eval for baseline success_rate and to measure iteration time before committing to fine-tune/LoRA epochs.
action.command:
export HF_HUB_OFFLINE=1 && python -c '
import os, json, torch
print("Data contents:", os.listdir("/data"))
if os.path.exists("/data/vlabench_train"):
    print("Train subdirs:", os.listdir("/data/vlabench_train"))
    with open("/data/vlabench_train/dataset_info.json") as f: print("Dataset info keys:", list(json.load(f).keys()))
print("Model cache exists:", os.path.exists("/root/.cache/huggingface/hub/models--lerobot--pi0_base"))
from lerobot.policies.pi0 import PI0Policy
from lerobot.policies.factory import make_pre_post_processors
policy = PI0Policy.from_pretrained("lerobot/pi0_base")
print("PI0Policy loaded. Config:", policy.config)
preprocess, postprocess = make_pre_post_processors(policy.config, "lerobot/pi0_base")
print("Processors created successfully")
print("CUDA available:", torch.cuda.is_available(), "devices:", torch.cuda.device_count())
' && python train.py
